response: Profile: I am a dedicated, organized, and leadership-oriented professional with over 15 years of experience in medical transcription. I have extensive knowledge of medical terminology across various specialties, including Orthopedics, Cardiology, Gynecology, Psychiatry, Radiology, and more. I possess strong interpersonal skills, am an excellent team player, and am eager to learn and develop new skills. I am reliable, dependable, and consistently seek new responsibilities to contribute to organizational success. My experience includes medical transcription, editing, supervision, and customer relationship management, with a proven ability to meet deadlines and maintain high accuracy. I am proficient in software platforms such as eClinicalWorks, Experity EMR, and MS Office. I am passionate about customer service and committed to delivering quality work in a fast-paced environment. I am currently on a visit visa and seeking a professional opportunity in India.
